components.name: SpecParser {#spec-parser}
components.description: Parse and validate an OpenAPI 3.x specification using `kin-openapi`.

components.name: LocalCache {#local-cache}
components.description: Cache parsed spec versions locally so subsequent CI runs can diff without a network call.

components.name: LocalDiffEngine {#local-diff-engine}
components.description: Fast embedded diff engine comparing two parsed OpenAPI specs.

components.name: Uploader {#uploader}
components.description: Asynchronously upload the LocalDiffResult to the Spring Boot server for audit persistence.
